scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n server,web "corepack yarn workspace @impos2/mock-terminal-platform-server dev" "corepack yarn workspace @impos2/mock-terminal-platform-web dev"
scripts.build: corepack yarn workspace @impos2/mock-terminal-platform-server build && corepack yarn workspace @impos2/mock-terminal-platform-web build
scripts.type-check: corepack yarn workspace @impos2/mock-terminal-platform-server type-check && corepack yarn workspace @impos2/mock-terminal-platform-web type-check
scripts.clean: corepack yarn workspace @impos2/mock-terminal-platform-server clean && corepack yarn workspace @impos2/mock-terminal-platform-web clean
